name: Lattice Semiconductor Corporation
description: Lattice Semiconductor Corporation is a leading designer and manufacturer of low-power, programmable field-programmable gate array (FPGA) devices. Founded in 1983 and headquartered in Hillsboro, Oregon, the company specializes in providing innovative programmable logic, mixed-signal, and interconnect solutions. Lattice serves a diverse range of markets, including industrial, automotive, communications, computing, and consumer electronics. By focusing on energy-efficient hardware acceleration and AI at the edge, the company enables its customers to rapidly develop and deploy sophisticated, secure, and power-optimized electronic systems for modern technological applications.
